email_subject: Application for Customer Service Medewerker - Logistiek
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker - Logistiek position at Forum Jobs. With a background in logistics at Katoen Natie and strong communication skills in Dutch (A2, in progress), English, and Turkish, I am confident in my ability to support your clients effectively.

In my role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, which gave me firsthand experience with the operational side of supply chain. Additionally, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I have honed my problem-solving and client communication skills while managing multiple projects independently.

I am eager to bring my customer-focused mindset and organizational skills to your team. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your client satisfaction.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker - Logistiek position at Forum Jobs. With a strong foundation in logistics operations and a proven ability to communicate effectively with clients and teams, I am confident I can contribute to your organization's commitment to excellent service.

In my recent role at Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were paramount. This experience gave me a solid understanding of warehouse operations and the importance of clear communication in ensuring smooth processes. I am accustomed to fast-paced settings and thrive on solving problems and keeping stakeholders informed.

Additionally, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I have developed strong organizational and client-facing skills. I manage multiple client websites, coordinate with internal teams, and ensure timely delivery of projects. This role has honed my ability to prioritize tasks, track details, and communicate proactively—skills directly transferable to customer service.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am eager to learn and adapt quickly to new systems and processes. Your description of a dynamic, international environment where collaboration and initiative are valued resonates with me.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background in logistics and customer interaction can benefit your team. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025–2026) ensuring accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment
Strong communication skills in Dutch (A2, in progress), English (professional), and Turkish (native)
Proven ability to manage multiple tasks independently and prioritize effectively
Experience in client-facing roles, handling inquiries and coordinating with teams
Detail-oriented with a focus on problem-solving and follow-through
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on logistics experience at Katoen Natie and strong client communication skills. Customer-focused and detail-oriented, with a proven ability to manage inquiries, track issues, and collaborate across teams. Fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Eager to apply my organizational and problem-solving skills in a customer service role within a dynamic logistics environment.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: client inquiry handling, issue tracking, follow-up, multilingual communication (English, Turkish, Dutch A2)
- Logistics & operations: warehouse operations, accuracy in high-volume environments, process adherence
- Problem-solving & prioritization: analyzing issues, finding solutions, managing multiple tasks
- Administrative & systems: data entry, information registration, attention to detail
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured smooth operations through attention to detail and adherence to processes

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
